PATIENT_ID: TEST_AKI_CONSULT_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-15 08:00:00

[CONSULT_NOTE] 2026-01-17 14:00:00
Nephrology Consultation:
Patient has developed acute kidney injury during hospitalization.
Creatinine has risen from baseline 1.0 to 3.6 mg/dL, greater than 3x baseline.
KDIGO stage 3 AKI. Recommend fluid resuscitation and monitoring of renal function.

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-17 10:00:00
Patient developed acute kidney injury during hospitalization.
AKI stage 3, creatinine rising. Nephrology consulted.
